message:
MVCC improvements: rebase index dedup, merge key extraction, lock table recovery, and new regime monitors

Multiple improvements to the MVCC subsystem:

deterministic_rebase: Pre-collect stale index entries from UpdateExpression
ops during rebase and discard stale IndexInsert/IndexDelete ops. This
prevents phantom index entries when a rebase replays an update expression
that modifies indexed columns — the old index entries must be pruned
before inserting the new ones.

physical_merge: Replace cell_key_digest hash comparison with actual index
key extraction via new extract_index_key_from_cell() function. Digest
comparison could produce false negatives on hash collisions; extracting
and comparing the actual key bytes is both correct and only marginally
slower for typical cell sizes.

shared_lock_table: Add load-factor recovery when no locks are held,
allowing the table to reclaim capacity after transient lock spikes.
Also add best-effort rebuild under capacity pressure to avoid blocking
new lock acquisitions when the table is nearly full.

New modules:
- conformal_martingale: Distribution-free regime shift detector using
  conformal p-values and game-theoretic betting martingales (e-processes)
  with finite-sample guarantees via Ville's Inequality
- regime_monitor: Unified regime monitoring facade combining BOCPD and
  conformal martingale detectors

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
